productDisplayName: Clarks Men Sentry Cry Leather Black Shoes
description: These clarks C& J derby shoes in rich black leather are sure to up your casual style this summer without compromising on your comfort. The textured upper and the subtle stitching add a distinctive, contemporary look and its lightweight soles with the Active Air technology are the perfect companion for your long, stress-free strolls on the golf links.UpperDerby shoes with upper made of textured pure leatherTwo-hole lace-ups for snug FitMidsoleSpongy EVA footbed, contoured for comfortThe double layer won& rsquo t flatten out through wear & ndash ensuring long-lasting comfortAir pockets and channels spread the impact as the feet hit the groundOutsoleWear-resistant outsoles with grooves and texture for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineStore away from sunlight
